case_title: LAURIE ALAOUI LACHGAR VS. RICARDO ARANZASO PAGADUAN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ALAOUI LACHGAR, LAURIE AS TO DEFENDANT PAGADUAN, RICARDO ARANZASO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LAURIE ALAOUI LACHGAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICHARDO ARANZASO PAGADUAN IS PRESENT. ASSISTED WITH TAGALOG INTERPRETATION BY JONATHAN PAGADUAN, SON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2017 - CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2017 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANA KRUZE. CLERK: B.PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (525)
ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT PAGADUAN, RICARDO ARANZASO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFER FROM SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAY-18-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR LAURIE ALAOUI LACHGER IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT AMOUNT PLUS INTEREST IS OFFERED AND ACCEPTED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR RICHARD ARANZASO PAGADUAN IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S SON IS PRESENT ON HIS BEHALF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-08-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT PAGADUAN, RICARDO ARANZASO
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT PAGADUAN, RICARDO ARANZASO MAILED TO RESPONDENT ALAOUI LACHGAR, LAURIE
